title: Epidendrum tumuc-humaciense
taxonomy: Epidendrum tumuc-humaciense is classified as an orchid species. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Epidendrum and the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The species is a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants, such as trees, for support. Epidendrum tumuc-humaciense is native to the tropical regions of South America and was discovered in the Guiana Shield. It is a rare species and is considered to be of high conservation value.
